name: RFdiffusion2
description: De Novo design enzymes given active site residues and atoms. Experimental validation of 3 diverse catalytic sites, identifying active catalysts in less than 96 sequences. In in-silico Motif Enzyme benchmarking spanning EC 1-5, produced at least one success for 41/41 cases vs 16/41 for prior RFdiffusion.
capabilities: De Novo design enzymes given active site residues and atoms
Experimental validation of 3 diverse catalytic sites, identifying active catalysts in less than 96 sequences
In in-silico Motif Enzyme benchmarking spanning EC 1-5, produced at least one success for 41/41 cases vs 16/41 for prior RFdiffusion

pdbFile.description: Input PDB file with active site residues and/or ligand atoms for enzyme design

activeSiteResidues.description: Catalytic residue positions defining the active site

ligandAtoms.description: Ligand or cofactor atom specifications for the active site

scaffoldLength.description: Length or length range of the designed enzyme scaffold

solventAccessibility.description: Control solvent accessibility of ligand atoms

numDesigns.description: Number of enzyme designs to generate

verify.description: Verify designs with ProteinMPNN and structure prediction
